purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

current.goal: Released scope at runCompletion ceiling with all 12 missions. Phase R75 heuristic gap scan: scan PRD for any remaining uncovered released-scope implementation clauses. Identified and tested uncovered clause 'OpenClaw is the only browser-facing execution actor'. All 634 unit tests pass; Phase R75 complete.
current.milestone: Phase R75 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).
current.next_action: FINAL_STOP — Phase R75 complete, all released-scope clauses have dedicated test coverage

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.milestone: Phase R75 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
history.summary: Phase R75 heuristic gap scan: Completed PRD clause verification scan. Identified uncovered clause: 'OpenClaw is the only browser-facing execution actor' (PRD System Boundary section, line 19). Created dedicated test file test_system_boundary_openclaw_only_execution_actor.py with three focused unit tests: (1) test_openclaw_is_sole_execution_mechanism — verifies all 12 missions execute exclusively through the OpenClaw adapter; (2) test_no_alternate_browser_execution_paths_exist — scans runtime source to confirm no alternate browser execution libraries are imported; (3) test_execution_adapter_is_required_parameter — confirms the adapter parameter is mandatory with no fallback. All 634 unit tests pass (631 existing + 3 new). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R75 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain. Phase R75 milestone and scope complete.
evidence: pytest tests/unit/ -q: 634 tests passing (631 existing + 3 new)
ruff check src/ tests/: All checks passed
Coverage ledger family 'Phase R75 heuristic gap scan' status changed to 'covered'
All released-scope clauses below pageReadyObserved now have dedicated test coverage

history.milestone: Phase R73 heuristic gap scan complete
history.summary: Phase R73 heuristic gap scan: Completed comprehensive PRD clause verification. Three uncovered clauses identified and tested: (1) R73: 'page_ready_observation marks the boundary within released scope' — added test_released_scope_marks_boundary_at_page_ready_observation validating page_ready_observation as 4th mission and boundary marker in the 12-mission pipeline. (2) R72: 'Current-state memory: docs/product/work-rag.json' — added test_work_rag_path_designated_for_current_state_memory in test_rag_paths.py. (3) R71: 'Durable lesson memory: docs/product/rag.json' — added test_lesson_rag_path_designated_for_durable_lesson_memory in test_rag_paths.py. All three clauses from Canonical Memory Model section (lines 111-123) and Release Boundary section (lines 47-61) now have dedicated unit test coverage. Final validation: 631 total tests passing, mypy clean, ruff clean. Phase R73 milestone complete with all discovered clauses tested.
evidence: pytest tests/unit/ -q: 631 tests passing (all three new tests included)
mypy src/: Success: no issues found in 48 source files
ruff check src/ tests/: All checks passed
All PRD clauses (below pageReadyObserved) now have dedicated test coverage

history.phase: Phases R67-R70 (scope expansion, initial heuristic gap scans, and intentional-stop coverage)
history.milestone: Foundation for continued heuristic gap scanning: 12-mission pipeline with intentional stop at released ceiling
history.summary: Compressed 3 checkpoint entries from R67-R70 phases. Phase R67 promoted all modeled missions to released scope and established the 12-mission pipeline (attach→runCompletion). Phase R69 added 6 unit tests for mission node execution (target_actionability_observation, armed_state_entry, trigger_wait, click_dispatch, click_completion, success_observation). Phase R70 added dedicated test for 'intentional stop at released ceiling' clause. These phases established the foundation for continued heuristic gap scanning with full released-scope coverage at runCompletion boundary.
evidence: Phase R67: Promoted all 8 modeled missions to released scope; established 12-mission pipeline
Phase R69: Added 6 unit tests in tests/unit/test_released_call_site.py for mission node execution
Phase R70: Added test_released_scope_includes_intentional_stop_clause for intentional stop coverage
Validation: all phases completed with mypy clean, ruff clean, pytest passing
